body:
## đźŽŻ Agentic Issue Triage

This is a **tracking issue** for migrating the **Azure CosmosDB management plane SDK** (`Azure.ResourceManager.CosmosDB`) from Swagger/AutoRest to TypeSpec-based generation (MPG = Management Plane Generator migration). It is a sub-issue of the parent tracking issue #53864 ("Azure Mgmt Generator migration").

- **SDK location:** `sdk/cosmosdb/Azure.ResourceManager.CosmosDB/`
- **Type:** Internal migration tracking issue (created by SDK team member)
- **Parent tracking issue:** #53864

<details>
<summary>đź“‹ Migration Checklist</summary>

Standard MPG migration steps for `Azure.ResourceManager.CosmosDB`:

- [ ] Locate the TypeSpec spec for CosmosDB in `azure-rest-api-specs` (likely under `specification/cosmos-db/`)
- [ ] Set up `tsp-location.yaml` pointing to the CosmosDB TypeSpec spec
- [ ] Run `tsp compile` to generate the SDK via the Azure Management Generator
- [ ] Build the generated SDK (`dotnet build`)
- [ ] Run `dotnet test` to validate no regressions
- [ ] Address any breaking changes (use `CodeGenSuppress`, `CodeGenType`, partial classes, or TypeSpec decorators such as `@@clientName`, `@@access`, `@@alternateType` as needed)
- [ ] Export updated public API listing: `pwsh eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 cosmosdb`
- [ ] Update `CHANGELOG.md` with migration notes
- [ ] Open a PR and trigger CI

</details>

<details>
<summary>đź”§ Debugging & Migration Tips</summary>

- Use the **`mpg-sdk-migration` skill** for step-by-step migration guidance specific to this repo.
- Use the **`mitigate-breaking-changes` skill** if breaking changes surface during migration.
- For complex breaking changes: `CodeGenSuppress` + custom partial class for suppressed members; `@@clientName` in `client.tsp` to rename types/properties.
- If flattened properties cause build errors (`CS0103: scope does not exist`), check the sync method stub for missing `DiagnosticScope` (known generator bug in sync method generation for Collection/Resource/MockableResource files).
- The `enable-wire-path-attribute: true` option in `tspconfig.yaml` ensures `WirePathAttribute` is generated on model properties (needed if the previous AutoRest version emitted these).
- After any regeneration, always re-run `Export-API.ps1` to keep the `api/` listings current.

</details>

<details>
<summary>đź“š Useful Resources</summary>

- [MPG Migration Skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/SKILL.md)
- [Mitigate Breaking Changes Skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/SKILL.md)
- [Parent tracking issue #53864](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864)
- [Completed migrations tracking #55080](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/55080)
- [Azure SDK Design Guidelines for .NET](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet/guidelines/)
- [Local SDK Generation Workflow](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/eng/common/instructions/azsdk-tools/local-sdk-workflow.instructions.md)

</details>
